# Kazi Samin Mahmud - Product Manager

> Portfolio of Kazi Samin Mahmud, a Product Manager in Dhaka focused on product strategy, analytics, user research, documentation, AI products, SaaS, MVAS, and measurable digital outcomes.

## Portfolio

- [Main portfolio](https://kazisamin.com/): Professional profile, expertise, experience, selected projects, skills, learning, and contact information.
- [Selected projects](https://kazisamin.com/#projects): Product case studies across recruitment, AI assessment, premium services, gaming, EdTech, and fitness.
- [Professional experience](https://kazisamin.com/#experience): Product roles at Riseup Labs, Bdjobs.com, and Adplay Technology.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/saminmahmud): Professional background and updates.
